title: fragaria nipponica var. mandshurica
intro: Fragaria nipponica var. mandshurica, also known as the Manchurian strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to East Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Fragaria nipponica var. mandshurica are used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are often consumed to promote overall well-being.
